summary: Iteration 93 - P0 Final Verification of OTP/Login fixes, UI floating icons, and email icon addition. All features verified and working correctly.

minor.issue: CORS errors when loading MSG91 script from verify.msg91.com, verify.phone91.com, control.msg91.com - but OTP flow still works via backend fallback

critical_code_review_comments: Email floating button (data-testid='email-float-btn') correctly added at line 2489-2499 in App.js
Email button links to mailto:support@asrenterprises.in - VERIFIED
Right-side floating icons (Facebook, Instagram, Email, Call) positioned at bottom-32 (128px) on mobile, above WhatsApp at bottom-20 (80px)
Left-side icons: AI Chat at bottom-20 (80px), Scroll-to-top at bottom-36 (144px) - NO OVERLAP
Admin Login page has Email+OTP and Mobile OTP tabs - VERIFIED
Staff Login page has Email+Password, Mobile OTP, and Email+2FA tabs - VERIFIED
Admin password login successfully moves to Step 2 OTP verification with 30-second resend timer
AI Chat Widget toggle opens chat interface correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified: (1) Email floating button added with correct mailto link, (2) All floating icons visible on desktop and mobile, (3) No overlaps between icons - right side icons are stacked vertically above WhatsApp, left side scroll-to-top is above AI chat, (4) Admin login with Email+OTP and Mobile OTP tabs working, (5) Staff login with 3 tabs (Email+Password, Mobile OTP, Email+2FA) working, (6) AI Chat Widget toggle opens chat correctly. MSG91 CORS errors appear in console but OTP flow works via backend.

features_verified.1. Homepage loads with all floating icon: VERIFIED - Facebook, Instagram, Email, Call on right; AI bot and scroll-to-top on left
features_verified.3. No overlap between right-side icons a: VERIFIED - Call at bottom-128px, WhatsApp at bottom-80px (48px gap)
features_verified.4. No overlap between scroll-to-top and: VERIFIED - Scroll-to-top at bottom-144px, AI chat at bottom-80px (64px gap)
features_verified.5. Admin Login page loads correctly: VERIFIED - Email+OTP and Mobile OTP tabs present
features_verified.6. Staff Login page loads correctly: VERIFIED - Email+Password, Mobile OTP, Email+2FA tabs present
features_verified.7. Admin password login form submits: VERIFIED - Moves to Step 2 OTP verification, shows 'OTP sent to mobile ending in ****6889'
features_verified.8. Staff login tabs work: VERIFIED - All 3 tabs have correct input fields and buttons
features_verified.9. AI Chat Widget toggle: VERIFIED - Opens chat widget with 'ASR Solar Expert' header
features_verified.10. Mobile responsive (390px): VERIFIED - All icons visible, no overlaps

console_observations.msg91_cors_errors: MSG91 script loading blocked by CORS from verify.msg91.com, verify.phone91.com, control.msg91.com - but OTP flow works via backend fallback
